description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a light gray mesh upper with synthetic overlays and a prominent Nike Swoosh logo on both sides. The shoe is accented with pastel colors, including pink eyelets, a green and yellow heel counter, and a blue-tinted, textured rubber outsole. The lacing system is standard with a pull tab at the heel and tongue for easy wearing. The midsole is thick and sculpted, providing cushioning and a distinctive, wavy design. The overall construction suggests breathability, comfort, and support, suitable for urban walking or running. The shoe appears clean and in excellent condition, with no visible signs of wear.
description: A stylish, multi-colored Nike athletic sneaker with a mesh upper, sculpted sole, and pastel accents. Features include a prominent Swoosh logo, pink lacing, and a textured blue outsole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Nike Swoosh, pastel green and yellow heel, and sculpted blue outsole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pink eyelets, gray mesh toe box, and tongue pull tab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible Swoosh, pastel heel, and detailed midsole design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the green/yellow heel counter, pink heel pull tab, and layered heel construction.
attribute_logo: Large black Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe
